title: cyperus capitellatus
intro: Cyperus capitellatus, also known as the umbrella sedge, is a type of plant species belonging to the Cyperaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus capitellatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and indigestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
